privileged_info_summary: The food.gdt dataset is real household survey data from Principles of Econometrics, 5th Edition, containing 40 cross-sectional observations of weekly food expenditure and weekly income. The three OLS regression models have verified AIC/BIC values: Linear model (AIC=361.50, BIC=364.88), Quadratic model (AIC=363.50, BIC=368.57), Square Root model (AIC=361.89, BIC=365.27). Both AIC and BIC prefer the Linear model. The output file is expected at /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/model_comparison.txt with a tolerance of ±2.0 for AIC/BIC value comparisons.
